answers.condition: Every retrieval result must expose status and authority labels in a non-optional field.
Use explicit authority labels and avoid vague equalizing labels.
Generated reports must be diagnostic_only, primary_evidence=false, and curriculum_authority=false.

answers.answer_label: Yes, but warning should be stronger
answers.condition: Pending-review edges must not be displayed as approved curriculum knowledge.
Diagnostic-only edges must be visibly marked as quality-control signals, not curriculum authority.
Evidence anchors must be surfaced where available, and missing anchors must be explicit.

answers.answer_label: Yes, but add a minimum-score warning
answers.condition: Low-score lexical matches must show match strength and weak-match warnings.

answers.answer_label: Yes, but must be a follow-up before teacher-facing use
answers.condition: Target exercises must be split into per-exercise chunks before production teacher-facing use.

answers.answer_label: Internal plus teacher-facing lookup plus lesson-authoring support
answers.condition: Lesson-authoring support must remain warning-preserving, human-reviewed, and non-authoritative.
Close R7.4 as pass_with_conditions, not pass.
